event_desc: An immersive masterclass exploring the connection between flavor, creativity, and brand identity. Led by industry professionals, participants will learn beverage innovation, coffee craftsmanship, latte art techniques, and content creation strategies while developing signature drinks that stand out in today's competitive F&B industry.

venue_cards.name: Virtual Office
venue_cards.desc: A professional business address in Surabaya without the overhead. Get a prestigious address, mail handling, and phone reception services.

venue_cards.name: Private Office
venue_cards.desc: Your own dedicated, lockable office space. Fully furnished and ready to use, with all utilities included for your team.

venue_cards.name: Meeting Room
venue_cards.desc: Professional meeting rooms equipped with the latest tech for presentations, video calls, and collaborative sessions.

venue_cards.name: Ballroom
venue_cards.desc: An elegant, spacious ballroom perfect for corporate events, product launches, seminars, and grand celebrations.

venue_cards.name: Coworking Space
